title: Daily Snapshot
description: The structured daily input object collected before each session. Rebuilt for OC user with symptom tracking. All downstream agents consume this.

hrv_ms.description: Heart rate variability in ms, from Apple Health overnight/morning reading.

rhr_bpm.description: Resting heart rate in bpm from Apple Health morning reading.

rhr_7day_avg.description: 7-day rolling average RHR. If unavailable, system uses stored rolling average from prior sessions.

rhr_delta.description: Computed: rhr_bpm minus rhr_7day_avg. Do not ask user.

subjective_energy.description: How do you feel right now? 1 = exhausted, 10 = excellent.

pill_pack_day.description: Current day in the pill pack. Days 1–21 = active pills, 22–28 = placebo. Used for pattern detection over time, NOT for intensity ceilings.

pill_phase.description: Computed from pill_pack_day. Active = days 1–21, Placebo = days 22–28.

symptoms.description: Daily symptom tracking. Each rated 0–3. Sum = symptom_load. Feeds into readiness scoring.

symptom_load.description: Computed: sum of all symptom scores. Do not ask user — calculate from symptoms object.

mood.description: General mood. 1 = very low, 5 = great. Tracked for pattern detection.

equipment_available.description: Defaults to home_gym on non-Tuesday days, planet_fitness on Tuesdays.

soreness.description: Muscle group soreness. Directly informs exercise selection — do not load sore areas heavy.

flow_status.description: Only relevant during placebo week. Tracked for iron deficiency awareness.

breath_location.description: Where the breath naturally sits when first noticed in the morning, BEFORE consciously trying to deepen it. chest = shallow/high, accessory muscles dominant; mixed = some belly engagement but not full; belly = diaphragmatic, relaxed. Tracks default nervous-system state over time. Tiffany's known baseline (2026-05-20) is chest-dominant — belly only moves with conscious focus. Watch for shifts toward 'mixed' or 'belly' as a signal of nervous-system regulation improving.

notes.description: Freetext. Stress, illness, schedule, fasted, etc.
